name: @bpmn-sdk/ai-server
description: Local AI bridge server for @bpmn-sdk — HTTP SSE server and MCP server for BPMN diagram editing via Claude, Copilot, or Gemini

scripts.bundle: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/bundle.cjs && esbuild src/mcp-server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/mcp-server.cjs && pnpm run bridge
